gift.title: Wedding Gift
gift.description: Your love and prayers are the greatest gifts. For those who wish to send a token of affection, you may use the details below:

hero.vow: Two souls, one heart — bound together by love, faith, and an unending promise.
hero.apologyText: We apologize if there is any misspelling of name or title

rsvp.title: Kindly Confirm Your Presence And Share Your Blessings
rsvp.description: Your presence would mean everything to us. Please take a moment to let us know if you can join our celebration, and feel free to share your warm wishes for our journey ahead.
rsvp.successMessage: Terima kasih! RSVP kamu sudah kami terima. Sampai jumpa di hari istimewa kami.

share.whatsappTemplate:
Halo {{name}},

Kami mengundangmu untuk hadir di pernikahan kami. Silakan buka undangan lewat link berikut:
{{link}}

Tolong konfirmasi ya, kami menantikan kehadiranmu.
share.ogDescription: Kami mengundangmu untuk merayakan hari istimewa kami. Klik tautan undangan untuk melihat detail acara dan RSVP.

bride.title: The Bride
bride.relationDescription: Grace, laughter, and love — three words that perfectly describe Catherine. Born into a family that values togetherness, she carries warmth in everything she does. The moment she met Hanson, she knew their story was only just beginning.

ceremony.title: Holy Matrimony
ceremony.address: Jl. Taman Palem Lestari No.1 Blok B 13, Cengkareng Barat, Jakarta, 11730, Indonesia

reception.title: Reception
reception.address: Jl. Taman Palem Lestari No.1 Blok B 13, Cengkareng Barat, Jakarta, 11730, Indonesia

groom.title: The Groom
groom.relationDescription: A dedicated professional with a heart full of warmth, Hanson is known for his calm presence and unwavering devotion. He fell in love with Catherine's kindness and knew from the very first moment that she was the one.

gallery.quote: Every love story is beautiful, but ours is my favorite. Through the highs and lows, our love grows stronger and deeper with each passing day.
gallery.title:
Unveiling
Our Prewedding Story

profile.quoteText: I have loved you so much, with such folly and excess — you have become the very center of my being, and I have forgotten everything else in the world but you.

thankYou.note: Your presence and blessings mean the world to us. Thank you for being part of our most cherished day — we are truly honored to celebrate with you.
thankYou.title: With Gratitude & Love

dressCode.text:
WE KINDLY ENCOURAGE OUR GUESTS TO
WEAR THESE COLORS FOR OUR SPECIAL DAY
dressCode.title: Dress Code

chapters.title: When Two Worlds Met
chapters.description: 202x, we started our journey as two individuals who were just getting to know each other. We were excited to explore what the future held for us and were eager to see where our paths would lead.

chapters.title: Growing Together Through It All
chapters.description: In 202x, we continued our journey, facing challenges and obstacles along the way. We learned how to communicate effectively and work together as a team, and our relationship grew stronger as a result.

chapters.title: The Beginning of Forever
chapters.description: And now, in 202x, we have reached the pinnacle of our journey – marriage. It has been a joyous and exciting ride filled with laughter, love, and endless possibilities. We have made countless memories together, from our first date to our engagement, and now our wedding day. Our journey has been a fulfilling one, and we are grateful for every moment we have shared. We look forward to continuing our adventure as a married couple.

livestream.title: Can't make it in person? Join us live and celebrate with us from wherever you are.
